description: Day 14 evaluation set for the 30-day RAG challenge. 20 questions over the combined Day 12 (quarterly reports) and Day 13 (corporate documents) corpora. Each item has the question, the source document(s) a correct retrieval must surface (doc-level ground truth), a reference answer for generation scoring, and a tag: 'factual' (answer lives in one current document) or 'history' (answer requires superseded versions).

items.question: How much did NorthPeak's revenue grow in Q2 2026, and what was the revenue figure?
items.reference_answer: NorthPeak's revenue grew 3.4% over the previous quarter in Q2 2026, reaching $426 million, at the upper end of guidance.

items.question: What primarily drove NorthPeak's revenue growth in Q1 2026?
items.reference_answer: Growth in Q1 2026 was driven primarily by the cross-border freight segment, which expanded 6.8% as new trade lanes between Toronto and Chicago came online.

items.question: What dividend did NorthPeak's board approve, and when is it payable?
items.reference_answer: The board approved a quarterly dividend of $0.18 per share, a 12% increase, payable in August.

items.question: Why did NorthPeak's gross margin improve in the second quarter of 2026?
items.reference_answer: Gross margin recovered by 60 basis points because the fleet maintenance program concluded ahead of schedule and fuel surcharge mechanisms caught up with diesel prices.

items.question: What fleet-related issue affected NorthPeak's margins in Q1 2026?
items.reference_answer: A one-time fleet maintenance program affecting roughly 9% of the trailer fleet, together with higher fuel costs, compressed gross margin by 40 basis points.

items.question: What is NorthPeak's revenue growth guidance for Q3 2026?
items.reference_answer: Management guided to revenue growth of 2% to 3% for the next quarter, with same-day expansion partially offset by expected softness in industrial freight volumes.

items.question: Why did BlueHarbor's gross margin decline in Q2 2026?
items.reference_answer: Gross margin compressed by 90 basis points due to promotional intensity in apparel and higher last-mile delivery costs; management attributed the decline primarily to markdowns taken to clear spring apparel inventory.

items.question: What share of BlueHarbor's revenue comes from e-commerce?
items.reference_answer: E-commerce represents 31% of BlueHarbor's total revenue, up from 27% a year ago.

items.question: What is BlueHarbor's most significant risk for next quarter?
items.reference_answer: Inventory risk in apparel: a failure of the fall assortment reset would likely require markdowns exceeding those taken this quarter.

items.question: How many drivers does NorthPeak need to hire for the same-day delivery expansion, and over what period?
items.reference_answer: Approximately 400 drivers across five markets in under ninety days.

items.question: How many days per week are employees currently required to be in the office?
items.reference_answer: A minimum of two (2) days per week under Remote Work Policy v3.0, with Wednesday as the single company-wide anchor day and the second day chosen at team level.

items.question: What is the current home office equipment allowance?
items.reference_answer: A renewed allowance of $400 every three years, available to all hybrid and remote employees.

items.question: What is the current daily meal reimbursement limit during business travel?
items.reference_answer: Up to $75 per person per day, with itemized receipts required for any meal above $40, under Travel & Expense Policy v2.0.

items.question: What expense amount currently requires VP approval?
items.reference_answer: Expenses above $7,500 require VP approval and a pre-trip authorization form under the current policy.

items.question: Under the current policy, when can premium economy be booked?
items.reference_answer: For flights exceeding five hours, without additional approval.

items.question: By what date must employees enroll a security key or passkey?
items.reference_answer: Before May 15, 2026, ahead of the June 1, 2026 deadline when phishing-resistant MFA becomes mandatory.

items.question: Which MFA methods are being disabled, and when?
items.reference_answer: SMS and voice one-time codes will be disabled on June 1, 2026.

items.question: Who is exempt from individual MFA enrollment?
items.reference_answer: Shared workstation roles in manufacturing, which will use badge-tap authentication instead.

items.question: How does the ingestion pipeline decide which version of a document is the latest?
items.reference_answer: The pipeline groups documents by title, sorts by version, and sets isLatest=true only on the highest version of each title; superseded documents remain searchable for audit but are excluded from default retrieval.

items.question: How did the office attendance requirement change across all versions of the Remote Work Policy?
items.reference_answer: It changed from 1 day per week (v1.0, 2024) to 3 days per week (v2.0, 2025) and then to 2 days per week (v3.0, 2026).
